overview: The program aims to equip students with a comprehensive understanding of business, e-business and management principles, blending key concepts, theories, and practices. It focuses on developing essential skills such as analytical thinking, problem-solving, and teamwork. Besides the classroom, students engage in co-curricular and extracurricular activities, seminars and study tours, to enhance vital soft skills such as communication and leadership.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Play quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota
eligibility: Minimum CGPA 2.5 or SSC/Equivalent exam result (5 or 2.5 out of 4). For getting admission into this bachelor course: The minimum CGPA 2.5 or SSC/Equivalent exam result (5 or 2.5 out of 4). Of these 3 subjects, applicants must have minimum 'B' grade and 3rd grade.
curriculum_highlights: Contemporary Issues of Human Resource Management
